full_text:
Fan Xian 范先
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Xian (范先). Aided Gao Gan against Cao Cao but Du Ji’s work ensured their failure. Fan Xian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Yuan Shao. Fan Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
